name: SM Kuzmeskus Inc
principals: Pam Reipold (CEO), Michael Doyle (VP), Trevor Berman
districts_or_customers: Franklin County Technical School; Greenfield Public Schools; Four Rivers Charter Public School; Erving School Union 28; Gill-Montague, Mohawk Trail, Pioneer Valley regional districts; serves MA and VT
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility on September 1, 2022 - became 6th MA company and 13th nationwide in Beacon's portfolio; operates as a Beacon brand with family management retained
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Already owned by Beacon Mobility (Audax-backed) since Sept 2022. Direct competitor to Summit/I Squared; do not pursue.

name: Swift River Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Ralph C. Mahar Regional & School Union 73 (Orange MA); Petersham Center School; Orange Elementary Schools
recent_news: Active small operator serving central MA school districts; no recent M&A or material news found
website: u73.rcmahar.org (listed; appears to be school district site, not company site - no standalone web presence found)
fit_notes: Small independent rural MA contractor (~$650K-$962K revenue, ~27 employees) serving Union 73 (Mahar Regional) and Petersham. Tiny scale but could be a low-cost tuck-in to build density in north-central MA; ownership info thin - direct outreach needed.

name: Integrity Student Trnsprtn Svc
districts_or_customers: Operates in Richland County / Columbia SC area; SC PSC Class C Charter Certificates No. 0346 and No. 8992 (charter bus authority)
recent_news: Small Black-owned, woman-owned SC charter and student transport operator; founded 2013; no M&A activity
fit_notes: Very small independent SC operator (~18 employees, ~$300K-$1M revenue). Too small to be a needle-mover, but a clean independent in Columbia/Blythewood market. Low-priority tuck-in; possibly useful if Summit needs Richland County density.

name: Kennedy Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Serves Lake City / Zumbro Falls area SE Minnesota school districts
recent_news: Long-tenured small family operator; no M&A or material news; clean safety record (zero crashes/OOS violations in past 24 months per FMCSA)
website: No standalone website found - listing's Stellantis.com is a data error
fit_notes: Tiny SE-MN independent (~13 buses, ~13 drivers, est. ~$650K-$960K rev), 58+ years old - classic succession-age family business. Too small standalone; only valuable as part of a MN regional roll-up alongside Bluff Country, Palmer Bus, etc. HQ is actually Zumbro Falls, not Lake City.

name: Scholastic Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Student Transportation of America (STA) / Student Transportation Inc (formerly Student Transportation of Canada)
principals: George Tucker (Manager per listing); John Ely (LinkedIn-listed Scholastic Bus Co employee)
districts_or_customers: Paterson NJ public schools and Tri-State / North Jersey districts (Paterson, Fair Lawn area)
recent_news: Acquired by Student Transportation of Canada (now Student Transportation of America / STA, owned by Caisse de depot CDPQ) on July 23, 2013
website: Listing's Scholastic.com is a data error (that is the publisher); operating site likely via STA / STBus
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Owned by Student Transportation of America (STA / CDPQ) since 2013 - direct strategic competitor to Summit. Note: a separate "Scholastic Transportation" (scholastictrans.com) operating in Brooklyn/East Stroudsburg PA is a distinct, independent woman-owned operator and could be a separate target.
